message:
Implement HTTP/2 protocol with session multiplexing

- Add http2.zig with frame encoding/decoding, HPACK static table
- Implement Http2Session class with connection preface, SETTINGS, PING
- Add Http2Stream for multiplexed request/response streams
- Support http2.connect() for client connections
- Support http2.createServer() using net socket infrastructure
- Binary frame parsing: DATA, HEADERS, SETTINGS, PING, GOAWAY, RST_STREAM
- Simplified HPACK encoding (literal without indexing)
- Full constants and error codes per RFC 7540/7541
